subcodes.first_line: God willing, may all the handmaidens of God attain unto that which He hath ordained for them, speak for the sake of God, and unto God direct their gaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله جمیع اماء الله بما اراده الله فائز شوند لله تکلم نمایند و الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
